mapper.select: SELECT qna_no AS qnaNo, member_no AS memberNo, cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, title, content, answer, answer_member_no AS answerMemberNo, status, reg_date AS regDate, answer_date AS answerDate FROM qna ORDER BY qna_no DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna(member_no, cs_cate_no, title, content, answer, answer_member_no, status, reg_date, answer_date) VALUES(#{memberNo}, #{csCateNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{answer}, #{answerMemberNo}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'WAIT'), NOW(), #{answerDate})
